summary: Phase 4 Billing Rebuild - All 33 tests PASSED. Verified canonical billing_service.py SSOT implementation: plans endpoint (4 plans with correct pricing), status endpoint (entitlement fields), checkout session creation, all webhook event types (checkout.completed, subscription.updated, subscription.deleted, payment_failed), cancel/sync/verify-session endpoints, entitlement enforcement (unit limits), and auth requirements.
critical_code_review_comments: BILLING_SERVICE.PY VERIFIED: Canonical SSOT with apply_subscription_update() sentinel pattern working correctly
WEBHOOK EVENTS VERIFIED: checkout.session.completed, customer.subscription.updated, customer.subscription.deleted, invoice.payment_failed all handled correctly
ENTITLEMENT ENFORCEMENT VERIFIED: Free plan limit (2 units) enforced, upgrade via webhook allows more units
THIN ROUTES VERIFIED: billing.py delegates to billing_service.py, no business logic in routes
AUTH REQUIREMENTS VERIFIED: All 7 billing endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
PLAN PRICING VERIFIED: free=CHF0/2units, starter=CHF29/10units, pro=CHF79/50units, enterprise=custom/unlimited
DEMO SEED VERIFIED: Seeds demo agent with 'pro' plan, idempotent cleanup works
seed_data_creation: Demo seed creates agent with 'pro' plan. Test created multiple test agents for entitlement testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 billing rebuild complete. All 33 tests passed verifying: (1) GET /api/billing/plans returns 4 plans with correct pricing, (2) GET /api/billing/status returns entitlement fields (plan_id, property_limit, unit_usage, can_create_unit), (3) POST /api/billing/create-checkout-session creates Stripe sessions for starter/pro, rejects free/enterprise, (4) POST /api/billing/webhook handles all 4 event types correctly, (5) POST /api/billing/cancel returns 400 when no subscription, (6) POST /api/billing/sync returns sync status, (7) Entitlement enforcement blocks unit creation at limit, allows after upgrade, (8) All endpoints require auth. Demo agent response is FLAT (user_id, email, name, role, token) not nested under 'user'.

webhook_events.subscription_deleted: PASSED - downgrades to free, clears subscription_id

entitlement_enforcement.upgrade_allows_more: PASSED - webhook upgrade to pro allows unit creation
